subject: Budget Reallocation Proposal - Marketing to R&D
body:
Dear Finance Committee,

I'm proposing a reallocation of $500K from the marketing budget to R&D for Q2. Our customer acquisition cost has decreased by 22% due to organic growth, while our product roadmap requires additional engineering resources for the AI features launch.

Proposed changes:
- Marketing: reduce from $2.1M to $1.6M
- R&D: increase from $3.4M to $3.9M
- Net impact on EBITDA: neutral

The marketing team has signed off on this as they can maintain current lead generation with the reduced budget through improved channel efficiency.

Looking forward to discussing this at the next board meeting.
